description: Create the @quant/browser-agent package with all modules: types, browser actions, action planner, page state, session manager, trust framework, action replay, and comprehensive tests. Interface-only for browser interaction (no Playwright dep). Trust framework enforces confirm-before-pay as a mandatory safety gate.
steps: Create packages/browser-agent/package.json following the pattern in packages/quant-notebook/package.json. Name: @quant/browser-agent, private, type module, scripts: typecheck, test, build, lint. devDependencies: @types/node ^22, typescript ~5.5.0, vitest ^2.

Create packages/browser-agent/tsconfig.json following packages/quant-notebook/tsconfig.json pattern: composite, ES2022 target, ESNext module, bundler moduleResolution, outDir dist, rootDir src, types vitest/globals.

Create packages/browser-agent/src/types.ts with all type definitions: BrowserAction (discriminated union by type: click, type, scroll, navigate, extract, screenshot, wait, select), ActionResult (success, data?, screenshot?, error?), PageState (url, title, visibleText, formFields, clickableElements, screenshotUri, extractedData, domSummary), BrowserSession (id, siteUrl, status, actions, startedAt, lastActivityAt, cookies interface), SiteAuth (sitePattern, granted, grantedAt, grantedBy), SpendingCap (sessionLimit, currentSpend, currency), ActionTier enum (read_only, write, purchase), ReplayEntry (timestamp, action, result, screenshotUri).

Create packages/browser-agent/src/actions/browser-actions.ts with: createAction factory functions for each action type (createClickAction, createTypeAction, createScrollAction, createNavigateAction, createExtractAction, createScreenshotAction, createWaitAction, createSelectAction), a validateAction function that ensures required fields are present, and a classifyAction function that returns the ActionTier (read_only/write/purchase) for trust gating.

Create packages/browser-agent/src/planner/action-planner.ts with ActionPlanner class: constructor takes config (maxActions, retryLimit), plan(goal: string, pageState: PageState) returns ActionSequence (array of BrowserAction with estimated cost), replan(goal, pageState, failedAction, error) returns new ActionSequence, tracks totalActionsExecuted against maxActions limit. Uses an ActionPlannerStrategy interface for the actual LLM/vision model call (dependency injection).

Create packages/browser-agent/src/state/page-state.ts with PageStateManager class: createFromSnapshot(url, title, elements) builds a PageState, updateAfterAction(state, action, result) returns updated PageState, summarizeForLLM(state) returns a compact string representation suitable for LLM context, extractFormFields(state) returns form fields from the page.

Create packages/browser-agent/src/session/session-manager.ts with SessionManager class: createSession(siteUrl, userId) returns BrowserSession, endSession(sessionId), getSession(sessionId), recordAction(sessionId, action, result) appends to session log, checkTimeout(sessionId) returns boolean (30 min inactivity), listActiveSessions(userId). Stores sessions in a Map (in-memory). Cookie storage via an EncryptedCookieStore interface (not implemented, just the interface).

Create packages/browser-agent/src/trust/trust-framework.ts with TrustFramework class: authorize(sitePattern, userId) grants access, isAuthorized(url, userId) checks, setSpendingCap(sessionId, limit, currency), checkSpendingCap(sessionId, amount) returns boolean, requiresConfirmation(action) returns { required: boolean, reason?: string, tier: ActionTier }, confirmAction(sessionId, actionId, confirmed: boolean) marks action as user-confirmed or rejected. Confirm-before-pay is MANDATORY for purchase-tier actions - throws if not confirmed.

Create packages/browser-agent/src/audit/action-replay.ts with ActionReplayRecorder class: startRecording(sessionId), record(sessionId, entry: ReplayEntry), getReplay(sessionId) returns ReplayEntry[], exportAsJSON(sessionId) returns string, getTimeline(sessionId) returns entries sorted chronologically. Stores entries in a Map.

Create packages/browser-agent/src/index.ts as barrel export: export all types from types.ts, export BrowserActions (factory functions + validate + classify), export ActionPlanner + ActionPlannerStrategy, export PageStateManager, export SessionManager + EncryptedCookieStore interface, export TrustFramework, export ActionReplayRecorder.

Create packages/browser-agent/src/__tests__/browser-actions.test.ts: test createClickAction/createTypeAction/etc produce valid actions, test validateAction rejects malformed actions, test classifyAction correctly identifies read_only (navigate, extract, screenshot), write (click, type, select), purchase (actions with payment-related selectors/text).

Create packages/browser-agent/src/__tests__/action-planner.test.ts: test plan returns action sequence given goal + page state, test replan produces different sequence after failure, test maxActions limit stops planning, test cost tracking increments correctly.

Create packages/browser-agent/src/__tests__/session-manager.test.ts: test createSession/getSession lifecycle, test endSession marks closed, test recordAction appends, test checkTimeout after 30 min inactivity returns true, test listActiveSessions filters by userId, test session isolation between users.

Create packages/browser-agent/src/__tests__/trust-framework.test.ts: test authorize/isAuthorized flow, test setSpendingCap/checkSpendingCap enforcement, test requiresConfirmation for each ActionTier, test confirmAction for purchase tier (must confirm before proceeding), test confirm-before-pay throws if action proceeds without confirmation.

Create packages/browser-agent/src/__tests__/action-replay.test.ts: test startRecording/record/getReplay flow, test exportAsJSON produces valid JSON string, test getTimeline is chronological, test entries include screenshots as URIs not base64.
Run pnpm install from workspace root to register the new package.
Run pnpm --filter @quant/browser-agent typecheck to confirm no type errors.
Run pnpm --filter @quant/browser-agent test to confirm all tests pass.
Run pnpm --filter @quant/browser-agent build to confirm tsc build succeeds.
acceptance_criteria: packages/browser-agent/package.json exists with correct name @quant/browser-agent and all standard scripts
pnpm --filter @quant/browser-agent typecheck passes with no errors
pnpm --filter @quant/browser-agent test passes all tests (>=15 test cases across 5 test files)
TrustFramework.requiresConfirmation returns required:true for purchase-tier actions
TrustFramework throws or rejects if a purchase-tier action is executed without explicit user confirmation
Total lines of code across all new files is <=500 LOC (excluding blank lines and comments)
verification: pnpm install (registers the package in workspace)
